content.json:
# Agentic AI - Agent Overview Dashboard
Real-time monitoring of all AI agent activity, approval rates, and performance.

content.query: customEvents | where name startswith 'agent_action' | extend AgentName = tostring(customDimensions.agent_name) | summarize Actions = count() by AgentName, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | render timechart
content.title: Agent Activity Over Time

content.query: customEvents | where name startswith 'agent_action' | extend Status = tostring(customDimensions.status), AgentName = tostring(customDimensions.agent_name) | summarize Approved = countif(Status == 'approved'), Rejected = countif(Status == 'rejected'), Failed = countif(Status == 'failed') by AgentName | render barchart
content.title: Agent Action Outcomes

content.query: customEvents | where name startswith 'agent_action' | extend RiskLevel = tostring(customDimensions.risk_level) | summarize count() by RiskLevel | render piechart
content.title: Actions by Risk Level
